message:
feat: add search module combining semantic and full-text search

Also fixes searchVector in store.ts to use sqlite-vec's required
'k = ?' KNN constraint instead of SQL LIMIT.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -183,9 +183,8 @@ export class Store {
       SELECT v.rowid, v.distance, n.id, n.title
       FROM nodes_vec v
       JOIN nodes n ON n.rowid = v.rowid
-      WHERE embedding MATCH ?
+      WHERE embedding MATCH ? AND k = ?
       ORDER BY distance
-      LIMIT ?
     `).all(Buffer.from(embedding.buffer), limit).map((r: any) => ({
       nodeId: r.id,
       title: r.title,
